_comments.strategy: semantic = split by paragraph/section boundaries. Use 'fixed' for uniform chunks.
_comments.chunk_size_tokens: 512 balances specificity and context. Use 256 for precise QA, 1024 for summaries.
_comments.chunk_overlap_tokens: 10% overlap prevents info loss at chunk boundaries.
_comments.dimensions: 3072 for maximum quality. Use 1536 for cost savings (minor quality loss).
